reason: QA agent successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved and reported the page title "Example Domain", and closed the browser.

Typed message in textbox — Message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." entered successfully in the message input field.

Waited for agent response (up to 3 minutes) — Agent completed task within ~12 seconds, response found containing "Example Domain".

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly shows: 'The page title is "Example Domain".' and 'Done — the page at https://example.com has the title "Example Domain". Browser closed.'
